MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES (via Zoom):

Andrew C. Oberst; Brothers Smith LLP; 925-944-9700; appearing on behalf of defendants Eric Mao, SFR Recovery, Inc. and Kwan Wo Ironworks Inc.
Michael M. Lum; Leonidou & Rosin; 650-691-2888; appearing on behalf of plaintiffs Mariano Hernandez, MCH Development LLC, and M. Hernandez Construction, Inc.

Plaintiff contests the court's tentative ruling. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court rules as follows:

DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT JUDGMENT is GRANTED. Defendants to file and serve their answers no later than June 23, 2022 by 5:00 p.m.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
